main.description: List pending policy actions queued for moderator review (§F22). Newest-first by id, with opaque cursor pagination. Optional filters narrow to one subject and/or one resolution state. Mod or Admin role.

subject.description: Account DID. When set, only pendings against this subject are returned. Returns SubjectNotFound (404) when the subject has no pending_policy_actions row at all (distinct from 'has rows but filter excluded them').

resolution.description: Resolution-state filter. Defaults to 'pending' (only unresolved rows — the moderator review queue). 'confirmed' / 'dismissed' surface historical resolutions.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a prior response.
Opaque pagination cursor for the next page; absent when this is the last page.

errors.name: SubjectNotFound
errors.description: The `subject` filter was provided but no pending_policy_actions row has ever been recorded for that DID.
